<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<REDMetadata version="5.0">
  <RMDVersion>5.0</RMDVersion>
  <ClipName>KOMODO_001_001</ClipName>
  <MasterISO>800</MasterISO>
  <Kelvin>5600</Kelvin>
  <Tint>0.0</Tint>
  <Exposure>0.0</Exposure>
  <Contrast>1.0</Contrast>
  <FLUT>0.0</FLUT>
  <ColorSpace>REDWideGamutRGB</ColorSpace>
  <Gamma>Log3G10</Gamma>
  <CDL>
    <Slope>1.0 1.0 1.0</Slope>
    <Offset>0.0 0.0 0.0</Offset>
    <Power>1.0 1.0 1.0</Power>
    <Saturation>1.0</Saturation>
  </CDL>
  <LookName>Neutral</LookName>
</REDMetadata>
